results.bodyText:
Skip to main content
PROOFOUND
How it works
For individuals
For organizations
Sign in
Request a pilot
Proof behind
the claim

Proofound turns real work into structured Proof Packs for privacy-safe hiring review before identity takes over.

Proof portfolios for individuals. Evidence-based review for teams.

Request a pilot
Create your proof portfolio
Blind by default

Photo, name, contact details, prestige markers, and other identity signals are removed first. The goal is not anonymity for its own sake. It is capability before bias.

Weak signal should leave before judgment begins.

01 / 09
Blind by default

THE STORY RESOLVES INTO ACTION

Build hiring on stronger proof

Proofound helps individuals present real capability through structured evidence, and helps organizations compare work-to-proof more clearly before time is lost.

FOR INDIVIDUALS

Create your proof portfolio

Start with a cleaner proof portfolio, then add proof, verification, and privacy-safe signal over time.

Start building

FOR ORGANIZATIONS

Explore evidence-based hiring

Review work through structured proof, clearer trust signals, and a more explainable assignment-fit review.

Talk to the team
PROOFOUND

Evidence-based hiring for a world with too much polished signal and too little proof.

© 2026 Proofound. Privacy-first by design.

Calm signal. Clearer proof. Better fit.
